elements.original_description: A young adult looking confused while holding a stack of bills and a calculator, pure white background
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a young adult looking confused while holding a stack of bills and a calculator. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background. High contrast, no shading or gradients. The style conveys a feeling of confusion and being overwhelmed.

elements.original_description: A person reading a book titled 'Personal Finance' with a laptop open next to them, pure white background
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a person reading a book titled 'Personal Finance' with a laptop open next to them. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background. High contrast, no shading or gradients. The style suggests self-education and personal initiative.
